title: InstaSmeltX
description: A plugin that allows furnaces to instantly smelt
body:
InstaSmeltX Introduction InstaSmeltX is a revolutionary Minecraft plugin designed to enhance your server's smelting experience without compromising the game's core resource mechanics. In vanilla Minecraft, waiting for items to smelt in furnaces can be a tedious and time-consuming process, especially when crafting in bulk. InstaSmeltX eliminates this waiting time while cleverly preserving the balanced fuel consumption that keeps your server economy intact. Unlike other instant smelting solutions that might break game balance by eliminating fuel requirements or other costs, InstaSmeltX takes a more thoughtful approach. Items are processed instantly, but fuel is consumed at the standard vanilla rate – meaning coal still smelts 8 items, lava buckets still process 100 items, and so on. This perfect blend of convenience and balance makes InstaSmeltX an ideal addition to survival, semi-vanilla, and economy-focused servers. Key Features ⚡ Lightning-Fast Processing Instant Smelting: Items are processed immediately upon entering furnaces Zero Wait Time: No more standing around waiting for your items to finish Bulk Processing Made Easy: Smelt stacks of materials in the blink of an eye ⚖️ Balanced Gameplay Preserved Fuel Economy: Maintains normal fuel consumption rates (coal = 8 items, etc.) Resource Costs Intact: Players still need to gather and use the same amount of fuel Economy-Friendly: Server economies remain balanced with resource costs unchanged 🧰 Complete Furnace Compatibility Universal Support: Works with all three vanilla furnace types: Regular Furnaces - For all general smelting needs Smokers - For food processing Blast Furnaces - For ore processing Selective Enabling: Configure which furnace types use instant smelting ⚙️ Extensive Configuration Flexible Settings: Fine-tune the plugin to suit your server's needs Per-Furnace Type Control: Enable or disable for specific furnace types Fuel Consumption Options: Choose between standard or custom fuel rates 🔧 Technical Excellence Lightweight Implementation: Minimal impact on server performance No Dependencies: Standalone plugin that works right out of the box Conflict-Free Design: Compatible with most economy and crafting plugins Why Choose InstaSmeltX? Perfect Balance of Convenience and Challenge InstaSmeltX enhances the Minecraft experience by removing tedious waiting times without removing the challenge of gathering resources. Players still need to collect the same amount of coal, charcoal, lava, or other fuels – they just don't have to waste time watching furnaces. Enhanced Player Experience Your players will appreciate the convenience of instant crafting without feeling like the server is "too easy." The plugin respects Minecraft's core gameplay loop while eliminating its most frustrating aspect – waiting. Server Performance Benefits By instantly completing smelting operations, InstaSmeltX reduces the number of active tile entities and ongoing processes the server needs to track, potentially improving overall performance on busy servers. InstaSmeltX does exactly what it promises – makes smelting instant while preserving game balance – with minimal overhead and maximum compatibility. Ideal for Multiple Server Types Survival Servers: Reduces grinding without eliminating challenge Economy Servers: Preserves resource value and economic balance Semi-Vanilla Servers: Maintains the vanilla experience with quality-of-life improvements Faction/Towny Servers: Speeds up base development without breaking resource gathering gameplay Installation and Setup Download the InstaSmeltX.jar file Place it in your server's plugins folder Restart your server Configure options in the config.yml file (optional) Enjoy instant smelting! The plugin works immediately with default settings, requiring no complex setup or configuration. Server owners looking for more control can easily adjust settings through the intuitive configuration file. Experience the perfect blend of convenience and balance with InstaSmeltX – where smelting is instant, but resource gathering still matters!
